English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Raymond Family papers
Raymond family.
2163
1 cubic feet. 1 cubic feet.
1855-1947. Accounts. Farm produce, fruit, crop, labor, pasturage, household and personal accounts of a Penfield, Monroe County New York family. Collection material in English 3050816
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
EAD encoding:
Martin Heggestad, December 2003
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Farm produce, fruit, crop, labor, pasturage, household and personal accounts of a Penfield, Monroe County New York family.
Cite As:
Raymond Family papers, #2163. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Penfield (N.Y.) -- Social life and customs. Agriculture. Finance, Personal. Families -- New York (State) -- Monroe County.

Raymond's [?] Business Transactions of farm & family:Inventory of Property11Expenses of Family11Incidental expenses11Expenses in Cultivating Farm11Paid for Permanent Improvements on Farm11Register of Employees11Sales of Farm Products11Record of all Crops Cultivated11Live Stock Register11Cash Account11General Accounts11Bills Receivable11Bills Payable11Summary or Balance Sheet11Record of Agricultural Fairs11Rates of Postage11Training Colts11Breeding Animals for Meat11Table of the Rates of Interest with Rule for casting11Contract with Employee11Memoranda11Order Book - order forms for Raymond Bros., George Raymond NurserymanJuly 10, 1872-Feb. 2, 187412Accountant's Cash BookFeb. 19, 1881-Dec. 10, 188613Memoranda (title on cover) - small brown leather cover; no clasp - C.C. Raymond) - Pasture records and accounts, cows, etc. (selling)May 1, 1898-Apr. 1, 192616Ledger (Brown covering with red binding) - C.B. Raymond accountsOct. 1, 1907-July 1, 1909In high school, probably senior year17Accounts of school fare, notebooks, books, school dance, haircut, home game, etc.17Series III.
